detail: All files attribute to authorized writers per file_schemas.md permission table. Build ran under inline dispatch mode (dispatch_mode='inline' in dag.json and build-complete.json). Coordinator legitimately wrote section state, builder outputs, integration files, harness report, etc. on behalf of overseers/builders/integrator. History log uses 'coordinator-inline-as-overseer-N' and 'coordinator-inline-as-integrator' attribution as required. Section state files set owner='coordinator-inline'. Spot-checked: builder output for rules-engine, strategy-table, game-state-machine, ui-render, hint-and-review, app-shell, edge-case-testing harness — all attributable to coordinator-inline-as-builder via dispatch-log.jsonl. No drift detected.

Greps over integration source for the 15 out-of-scope items in ledger-v1.json: login/auth/signup/password — no matches; fetch/XHR/network — no matches; sync/share — no matches; player_id/seat/socket — no matches; stripe/wallet/USD — no matches; count/true count/card counting — no matches; insurance — no matches; perfectpairs/21+3/sidebet — no matches; tournament/timer — no matches; share/leaderboard — no matches; cordova/ionic/react-native — no matches; i18n/locale/translate — no matches; analytics/tracking — no matches; tutorial/rules-explanation — no matches; surrender — no matches in production source (only mentioned defensively in tests.js as 'absent' check). Single 'no chart' mention in tests.js is intentional absence-verification text.

ledger-v1.json: version, created_at, project_name, restatement, assumption_ledger[14], inflection_points[5], out_of_scope[15] all present. sections-v1.json: version, based_on_ledger, inflection_resolutions[5] each with machine_checkable_assertions[], sections[7] each with acceptance_assertions[]. dag.json: version 8, nodes[8] with status/wave/depends_on, edges[16], current_wave 7. build-complete.json: signaled_at, all_sections_verified, integrator_verified, edge_case_testing_executed, ready_for_final_verification, next_steps_required[4] (critic_final_sweep, convergence_verifier, delivery_to_final_directory, run_report) — all v1.2 required fields present plus inline-mode metadata. state/sections/*.json: all 7 files have section_id, status='verified', sub_goals[]. manifest.json: entry_point='index.html', files[10].

All 7 sections (rules-engine, strategy-table, game-state-machine, ui-render, hint-and-review, app-shell, edge-case-testing) have state file with status='verified', have output files referenced in output/builders/{section}/, and all six production sections appear in manifest.section_outputs_used. Section-7 (edge-case-testing) contributes tests.html + tests.js via manifest. No section silently skipped.

IP1.A1 S17: rules-engine.js line 120 'if (score.total >= 17) break' fires regardless of soft — soft 17 stands. IP1.A2 DAS: rules-engine.js lines 101-103 'cards.length===2 && !hasHit' allows double on split sub-hand 2-card decision. IP1.A3 no surrender: zero literal occurrences in source. IP1.A4 3:2 payout: rules-engine.js line 140 'netDelta: Math.round(bet * 1.5)' returns 15 on bet=10. IP2.A1 no drill UI: grep clean for drill/mode-select/mode-toggle in production. IP2.A2 free-play loop: game-state-machine.js line 15 'phase: betting' is the boot state. IP3.A1 decision log shape: recordDecision pushes {playerHandSnapshot, dealerUpcard, chosenAction, correctAction}. IP3.A2 per-decision review rows: hint-and-review.js renderReview maps log 1:1. IP4.A1 action-only hint: renderHint sets els.hintDisplay.textContent = actionLabel — no extra DOM. IP4.A2 no chart in hint: hint-display only receives textContent strings; no img/table insertion path. IP5.A1 no chart panel: zero chart/cheat-sheet/strategy-chart elements in DOM scaffold. IP5.A2 strategy-table no render: single export 'recommendation', no DOM access.
Directory contains only .gitkeep — no Sev 0 fixes applied during this run, consistent with Coordinator's claim in build-complete.json summary. No scope_check claims to audit.

Every section has acceptance_assertions[] populated. Section 1: 6 assertions (S1.A1-A6) covering totals, blackjack/bust flags, legal actions, S17 dealer, 3:2 payout, Node-loadable purity. Section 2: 3 assertions (S2.A1-A3) covering basic-strategy spot checks, every-cell-defined, data-only export. Section 3: 5 assertions (S3.A1-A5) covering phase progression, illegal-dispatch noop, decision log shape, subscribe firing, next-hand from resolved. Section 4: 5 assertions (S4.A1-A5) covering DOM presence, button gating, Deal-live-in-resolved, hint live in player_turn, render-on-state. Section 5: 3 assertions (S5.A1-A3) covering hint reveal, review row count, label-only hint. Section 6: 4 assertions (S6.A1-A4) covering no-build-step, surfaces present, click-flow wiring, responsive scaffolding. Section 7: 5 assertions (S7.A1, A2, A3, A4, A5) covering harness existence, coverage check, deal-from-resolved flow, hint reveal flow, review row count. Every prose acceptance phrase has at least one structured assertion.

S3.A5 verified-in-source: game-state-machine.js dispatch() case 'deal' lines 313-316: 'if (state.phase==="betting") mutated=doDeal(); else if (state.phase==="resolved"||state.phase==="review") mutated=doNext()'. doNext (lines 300-307) preserves handsPlayed via 'const carriedHands=state.handsPlayed; state=freshState(); state.handsPlayed=carriedHands; startHand()'. No page reload. Harness covers via testS3A5 + testS7A3. S4.A3 verified-in-source: ui-render.js line 167 'const dealEnabled = (phase==="betting"||phase==="resolved"||phase==="review")', then setBtn(els.btnDeal, dealEnabled). Click handler line 69 dispatches {type:'deal'}. Harness covers via testS4A3 + testS7A3. S5.A1 verified-in-source: hint-and-review.js showHint() lines 7-16 calls stateMachine.getCurrentHintQuery() then strategyTable.recommendation(query.playerHandSnapshot, query.dealerUpcard) and writes via helpers.renderHint(action). Harness covers via testS5A1 + testS7A4. S5.A2 verified-in-source: hint-and-review.js onStateChange lines 69-72 fires renderReview on first entry to 'resolved'/'review'; renderReview lines 33-43 maps decisionLog 1:1 to rows then helpers.renderReviewRows(rows) which builds <tbody><tr> per row. Harness covers via testS5A2 + testS7A5.

summary: All 7 final_sweep checks performed. Writer-permission compliance clean under inline dispatch mode (history log attributes coordinator-inline-as-{role} legitimately per file_schemas.md v1.3). All 15 out-of-scope items confirmed absent from integrated artifact source. Schema conformance clean across ledger, sections, dag, build-complete, manifest, section-state files. Section coverage 7/7 with all sections verified, output files present, and referenced in manifest. Charter-implementation conformance: all 12 IP machine_checkable_assertions verified against integrated source (S17, DAS, no-surrender, 3:2, free-play-only, per-decision review, action-only hint, no chart embed). Sev 0 directory empty as Coordinator claimed. Acceptance-assertion coverage 100% across sections 1-7. The four critical user_flow assertions (S3.A5, S4.A3, S5.A1, S5.A2) are all VERIFIED IN SOURCE: dispatch case 'deal' branches resolved/review->doNext (S3.A5), renderControls computes dealEnabled with explicit allow-list including resolved+review (S4.A3), Hint click flows through getCurrentHintQuery -> strategyTable.recommendation -> renderHint (S5.A1), renderReview maps decisionLog 1:1 to <tr> rows on phase transition into resolved (S5.A2). No drift, no leakage, no flags.

Final sweep: clean. Zero flags. All 7 checks pass. Four critical user_flow assertions verified in integrated artifact source. No out-of-scope leakage. No Sev 0 abuse. Build is ready for Convergence Verifier and delivery.
